requirement_topic.en: ECAE Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 太阳能光伏逆变器的 ECAE 出口前合格评定（PVoC）
requirement_topic.zht: 太陽能光伏逆變器的 ECAE 出口前合格評定（PVoC）

summary.en: The Ethiopian Conformity Assessment Enterprise (ECAE) administers the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, which requires regulated products to be inspected, tested, and certified in the country of export before shipment to Ethiopia. A Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by an ECAE-authorised inspection body is required for customs clearance of in-scope product categories. The programme was expanded in May 2024 under Regulation No. 549/2024 to cover additional product categories beyond the initial solar focus. Stand-alone solar products ≤ 350 W have been covered since February 2022; exporters of grid-connected inverters should verify whether their product category and power rating fall within the current PVoC scope with ECAE or an authorised inspection body before shipment.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚合格评定企业（ECAE）负责管理出口前合格评定（PVoC）计划，要求受监管产品在出口国完成检验、测试和认证后方可运抵埃塞俄比亚。进口产品清关须由 ECAE 授权检验机构出具合格证书（CoC）。该计划于 2024 年 5 月依据第 549/2024 号法规扩展，涵盖初始太阳能领域以外的更多产品类别。350 W 及以下独立式太阳能产品自 2022 年 2 月起已纳入覆盖范围；出口并网逆变器的出口商应在出货前向 ECAE 或授权检验机构确认其产品类别和功率等级是否在当前 PVoC 范围内。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞合格評定企業（ECAE）負責管理出口前合格評定（PVoC）計畫，要求受監管產品在出口國完成檢驗、測試和認證後方可運抵衣索比亞。進口產品清關須由 ECAE 授權檢驗機構出具合格證書（CoC）。該計畫於 2024 年 5 月依據第 549/2024 號法規擴展，涵蓋初始太陽能領域以外的更多產品類別。350 W 及以下獨立式太陽能產品自 2022 年 2 月起已納入覆蓋範圍；出口併網逆變器的出口商應在出貨前向 ECAE 或授權檢驗機構確認其產品類別和功率等級是否在當前 PVoC 範圍內。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Conformity Assessment Enterprise establishment and PVoC programme
ES IEC TS 62257-9-8:2020 (stand-alone solar products, Ethiopian adoption)
IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 (safety of power converters for PV systems — referenced for inverter safety evidence)

summary.en: Chinese inverter manufacturers typically hold NB/T 32004 type-test reports, GB/T 19964 grid-connection test records, and CGC or TÜV safety certificates. These domestic documents support technical due diligence but are not accepted as substitutes for the Ethiopia ECAE PVoC CoC at the port of import.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器制造商通常持有 NB/T 32004 型式试验报告、GB/T 19964 并网测试记录及 CGC 或 TÜV 安全认证。这些国内文件有助于技术尽调，但不能替代埃塞俄比亚进口口岸要求的 ECAE PVoC CoC。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器製造商通常持有 NB/T 32004 型式試驗報告、GB/T 19964 併網測試記錄及 CGC 或 TÜV 安全認證。這些國內文件有助於技術盡調，但不能替代衣索比亞進口口岸要求的 ECAE PVoC CoC。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 (where held — supports PVoC application)

gap.en: Engage an ECAE-authorised inspection body before the shipment schedule is set. Confirm whether the inverter power rating and product category are in PVoC scope under the expanded 2024 programme. If in scope, arrange pre-export inspection and testing in China; obtain the CoC before goods are released. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test reports strengthen the PVoC application and may be required by the inspection body.
gap.zh: 在确定出货计划前，应委托 ECAE 授权检验机构。确认逆变器功率等级和产品类别是否在 2024 年扩展计划的 PVoC 范围内。如在范围内，应在中国安排出口前检验和测试，并在货物放行前取得 CoC。IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 测试报告可强化 PVoC 申请，且可能为检验机构所要求。
gap.zht: 在確定出貨計畫前，應委託 ECAE 授權檢驗機構。確認逆變器功率等級和產品類別是否在 2024 年擴展計畫的 PVoC 範圍內。如在範圍內，應在中國安排出口前檢驗和測試，並在貨物放行前取得 CoC。IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 測試報告可強化 PVoC 申請，且可能為檢驗機構所要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated product categories under the ECAE PVoC programme; scope of grid-connected inverters should be confirmed with ECAE or an authorised inspection body
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory pre-export verification for domestic Chinese market; exporters must comply with destination-country conformity requirements

source.publisher: TÜV Rheinland (ECAE-authorised inspection body, Ethiopia PVoC programme overview)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm the PVoC scope with ECAE or an authorised inspection body before shipment. If in scope, a CoC is required for customs clearance. IEC 62109 test evidence strengthens the application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应向 ECAE 或授权检验机构确认 PVoC 范围。如在范围内，清关须持有 CoC。IEC 62109 测试证据可强化申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應向 ECAE 或授權檢驗機構確認 PVoC 範圍。如在範圍內，清關須持有 CoC。IEC 62109 測試證據可強化申請。

requirement_topic.en: Ethiopian Energy Authority (EEA) Grid Code and EEU Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 埃塞俄比亚能源局（EEA）电网规范与 EEU 接入要求
requirement_topic.zht: 衣索比亞能源局（EEA）電網規範與 EEU 接入要求

summary.en: The Ethiopian Energy Authority (EEA) is the electricity and renewable-energy regulator responsible for the national grid code. The Ethiopia National Transmission Grid Code (ENTGC) and Ethiopia National Distribution Grid Code (ENDGC) set technical requirements for voltage, frequency, protection, and disconnection that inverter-connected generation must satisfy. Ethiopian Electric Utility (EEU) is the distribution utility and the practical connection counterparty for many distributed and commercial solar projects. Ethiopia operates at 220 V / 50 Hz. Renewable power plants must remain connected within the POC operating voltage band and within the 49.0–50.2 Hz frequency range. Grid-connected inverter projects require EEA licensing and EEU connection review; a product-level safety certificate alone does not constitute grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚能源局（EEA）是负责国家电网规范的电力和可再生能源监管机构。埃塞俄比亚国家输电网规范（ENTGC）和国家配电网规范（ENDGC）规定了逆变器并网发电须满足的电压、频率、保护和断路技术要求。埃塞俄比亚电力公用事业公司（EEU）是配电公用事业机构，也是众多分布式和商业光伏项目的实际接入相对方。埃塞俄比亚采用 220 V / 50 Hz 供电。可再生能源发电厂须在 POC 运行电压范围内及 49.0–50.2 Hz 频率范围内保持并网运行。并网逆变器项目须取得 EEA 许可并经 EEU 接入审查；产品级安全证书本身不构成并网批准。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞能源局（EEA）是負責國家電網規範的電力和可再生能源監管機構。衣索比亞國家輸電網規範（ENTGC）和國家配電網規範（ENDGC）規定了逆變器併網發電須滿足的電壓、頻率、保護和斷路技術要求。衣索比亞電力公用事業公司（EEU）是配電公用事業機構，也是眾多分散式和商業光伏專案的實際接入相對方。衣索比亞採用 220 V / 50 Hz 供電。可再生能源發電廠須在 POC 運行電壓範圍內及 49.0–50.2 Hz 頻率範圍內保持併網運行。併網逆變器專案須取得 EEA 許可並經 EEU 接入審查；產品級安全證書本身不構成併網批准。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Energy Authority (EEA) licensing and regulatory instruments

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence is typically based on GB/T 19964-2024, GB/T 37408, and NB/T 32004, with utility-specific parameter settings for the Chinese grid (50 Hz nominal, but with different voltage tolerance bands, reconnection timers, and protection relay settings). These records do not establish EEA licensing status or EEU connection approval for an Ethiopia project.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常依据 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408 和 NB/T 32004，以及中国电网（标称 50 Hz，但电压容差范围、重连定时器和保护继电器参数不同）的电网企业特定参数设置。这些记录不能证明埃塞俄比亚项目的 EEA 许可状态或 EEU 接入批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常依據 GB/T 19964-2024、GB/T 37408 和 NB/T 32004，以及中國電網（標稱 50 Hz，但電壓容差範圍、重連定時器和保護繼電器參數不同）的電網企業特定參數設置。這些記錄不能證明衣索比亞專案的 EEA 許可狀態或 EEU 接入批准。

gap.en: Prepare Ethiopia-specific inverter settings: 50 Hz nominal, 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, protection relay thresholds, anti-islanding logic, and reconnection timing per the ENTGC/ENDGC. Engage EEA and EEU early for project licensing and connection review. Build a connection pack with single-line diagrams, protection co-ordination, commissioning plan, and Ethiopian project-specific documentation.
gap.zh: 应准备埃塞俄比亚专用逆变器参数：50 Hz 标称、单相 220 V / 三相 380 V、保护继电器阈值、防孤岛逻辑，以及符合 ENTGC/ENDGC 的重连定时。尽早与 EEA 和 EEU 接洽，办理项目许可和接入审查。建立包含单线图、保护配合、调试计划和埃塞俄比亚项目专项文件的接入资料包。
gap.zht: 應準備衣索比亞專用逆變器參數：50 Hz 標稱、單相 220 V / 三相 380 V、保護繼電器閾值、防孤島邏輯，以及符合 ENTGC/ENDGC 的重連定時。盡早與 EEA 和 EEU 接洽，辦理專案許可和接入審查。建立包含單線圖、保護配合、調試計畫和衣索比亞專案專項文件的接入資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected projects under EEA licensing rules and EEU connection requirements; off-grid systems follow different electrical safety and project requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic grid approval is not accepted as EEA or EEU connection approval for Ethiopia projects

source.publisher: Encyclopedia MDPI — Grid Code Requirements in Ethiopia (academic summary of ENTGC/ENDGC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate the product import file from the Ethiopia project approval file. EEA and EEU decide grid-connection eligibility; a PVoC CoC or Chinese grid certificate alone does not approve generation or export to the EEU grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将产品进口文件与埃塞俄比亚项目批准文件分开处理。并网资格由 EEA 和 EEU 决定；PVoC CoC 或中国并网证书本身不批准向 EEU 电网发电或送电。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將產品進口文件與衣索比亞專案批准文件分開處理。併網資格由 EEA 和 EEU 決定；PVoC CoC 或中國併網證書本身不批准向 EEU 電網發電或送電。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety Evidence for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 太阳能光伏逆变器的 IEC 62109 安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: 太陽能光伏逆變器的 IEC 62109 安全證據

summary.en: IEC 62109-1 (general safety requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (particular requirements for inverters) are the internationally recognised safety standards for solar PV power converters. These standards are referenced by ECAE authorised inspection bodies for PVoC conformity assessment of solar inverter products imported into Ethiopia. Holding a valid third-party test report or certificate to IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 from an accredited laboratory materially strengthens a PVoC application and is commonly required by project owners and EPC contractors for grid-connected installations.
summary.zh: IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和 IEC 62109-2（逆变器专项要求）是太阳能光伏电力转换器的国际公认安全标准。ECAE 授权检验机构在对进口至埃塞俄比亚的太阳能逆变器产品进行 PVoC 合格评定时参照这些标准。持有认可实验室出具的有效 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 第三方测试报告或证书，可显著强化 PVoC 申请，并通常为并网安装的项目业主和 EPC 承包商所要求。
summary.zht: IEC 62109-1（通用安全要求）和 IEC 62109-2（逆變器專項要求）是太陽能光伏電力轉換器的國際公認安全標準。ECAE 授權檢驗機構在對進口至衣索比亞的太陽能逆變器產品進行 PVoC 合格評定時參照這些標準。持有認可實驗室出具的有效 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 第三方測試報告或證書，可顯著強化 PVoC 申請，並通常為併網安裝的專案業主和 EPC 承包商所要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2:2011 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters are commonly certified to NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specification) and carry CGC or TÜV test reports. Where the manufacturer also holds an IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 report from an accredited body, that report directly supports the Ethiopia PVoC application. NB/T 32004 alone is not treated as equivalent to IEC 62109 by ECAE-authorised inspection bodies.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器通常依据 NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）取得认证，并持有 CGC 或 TÜV 测试报告。如制造商同时持有认可机构出具的 IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 报告，该报告可直接支持埃塞俄比亚 PVoC 申请。ECAE 授权检验机构不将 NB/T 32004 单独视为 IEC 62109 的等效文件。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器通常依據 NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）取得認證，並持有 CGC 或 TÜV 測試報告。如製造商同時持有認可機構出具的 IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 報告，該報告可直接支持衣索比亞 PVoC 申請。ECAE 授權檢驗機構不將 NB/T 32004 單獨視為 IEC 62109 的等效文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 (where held by the Chinese manufacturer)

gap.en: Obtain a current IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test report or certificate from an accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model. Confirm scope (input voltage range, output voltage, power rating, isolation type) matches the Ethiopia-market configuration before relying on an existing certificate.
gap.zh: 应从认可实验室获取覆盖特定逆变器型号的现行 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 测试报告或证书。在依赖现有证书前，确认证书范围（输入电压范围、输出电压、功率等级、隔离类型）与面向埃塞俄比亚市场的配置相匹配。
gap.zht: 應從認可實驗室獲取覆蓋特定逆變器型號的現行 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 測試報告或證書。在依賴現有證書前，確認證書範圍（輸入電壓範圍、輸出電壓、功率等級、隔離類型）與面向衣索比亞市場的配置相匹配。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary as a standalone standard but practically mandatory for PVoC CoC issuance by ECAE-authorised inspection bodies and for project-owner acceptance in grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: NB/T 32004 is the common domestic equivalent; IEC 62109 is voluntary in China but required for many export markets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test evidence is practically required for Ethiopia PVoC clearance and project acceptance. Verify that the certificate covers the exact model and Ethiopia market configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 测试证据在实践中是埃塞俄比亚 PVoC 清关和项目验收的必要条件。核实证书覆盖确切型号及面向埃塞俄比亚市场的配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 測試證據在實踐中是衣索比亞 PVoC 清關和專案驗收的必要條件。核實證書覆蓋確切型號及面向衣索比亞市場的配置。
